rag_rules: Place AGREE contracts in component type scopes for port-level assumptions and guarantees, and in implementation scopes for subcomponent bindings.
Use annex agree {** ... **}; blocks for AGREE contract syntax and ensure all identifiers are visible in the current scope.
generic_rules: Preserve AADL scope and type consistency when inserting AGREE annexes.
Use only visible AADL features or declared helpers in AGREE expressions.
Ensure AGREE scalar types match AADL conventions (int, real, bool).
Avoid introducing package-qualified identifiers not present in the model.
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE contracts use assume/guarantee syntax with labeled expressions.
Equations and constants in AGREE must declare correct types and use valid expressions.
anti_patterns: Do not reference AADL properties like Period or Stack_Size as AGREE variables.
Do not invent new identifiers or types not visible in the current AADL scope.
irrelevant_topics: AGREE validator diagnostics and repair patterns
